title: Pan-Seared Tilapia with Chile Lime Butter
ingredients: ½ stick (¼ cup) unsalted butter, softened
1 teaspoon minced fresh Thai or serrano chile (preferably red), including seeds
6 skinless tilapia fillets (or striped bass fillets with skin)
instructions:
Stir all chile lime butter ingredients together until well combined. Set aside.
Pat fish dry and season with salt. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large nonstick skillet over moderately high heat until just smoking. Cook half the fish, turning once, until golden and just cooked through. Transfer to plate. Repeat with remaining oil and fish.
Serve each piece topped with a dollop of chile lime butter.
